title: De club van Sinterklaas en de race tegen de klok
original_title: De Club Van Sinterklaas: De Race Tegen De Klok
overview: In the film, St. Nicolas' Eve threatens to be canceled because a young Piet drops St. Nicholas's clock. In addition, the Saint's horse is behaving very strangely because he has run into Britt Dekker.
